name: leo
initializeCommand: bash -c 'ws="$1"; if [ -n "${AGENTIC_DC_INIT:-}" ] && [ -f "$AGENTIC_DC_INIT" ]; then exec bash "$AGENTIC_DC_INIT" "$ws"; fi; d="$ws"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.devcontainer/init.sh" ]; then exec bash "$d/.devcontainer/init.sh" "$ws"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; echo "init.sh not found above $ws (set AGENTIC_DC_INIT or run via up.sh)" >&2; exit 1' -- ${localWorkspaceFolder}
